title: Information We Collect
description: We collect basic account information such as your name, email address, profile photo, and colocation activity (tasks, expenses, messages).

title: Data Sharing
description: We do not share your personal information with third parties. Your data is only visible to members within your colocation.

title: Account Deletion
description: You can request account deletion at any time from the Manage Account section.

title: Footer Note
description: For any privacy concerns, please contact support.
